events.event_description: Frank V. Ortiz, Jr. appointed U.S. Special Representative to Saint Christopher-Nevis-Anguilla (among other states), concurrent with his ambassadorship to Barbados and Grenada, establishing a liaison-level presence prior to independence.

evidence.quote: Frank V. Ortiz, Jr. was appointed United States Special Representative to the States of Antigua, Dominica, Saint Christopher-Nevis-Anguilla, St. Lucia, and Saint Vincent on September 1, 1977. The appointment was concurrent to his positions as Ambassador to Barbados and Grenada.

events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established on September 20, 1983, the day after independence. All U.S. ambassadors have been resident at Bridgetown, Barbados, making this a nonresident ambassadorial relationship.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on September 20, 1983.
All U.S. ambassadors have been resident at Bridgetown, Barbados.
